text:
NBC has decided to bring Snoop Dogg to the Olympics in Paris, as the games no doubt just got more interesting for some fans.

title: Snoop Dogg Is Now an Olympic Correspondent for NBC
description: NBC has decided to bring Snoop Dogg to the Olympics in Paris, as the games no doubt just got more interesting for some fans.
